tooltip.soa_additions.ba_blood_orange.de: An unnaturally red orange, pulsing with life energy.
tooltip.soa_additions.ba_glass_sacrifici: A dagger made of glass shards. Cuts deeper than steel.
tooltip.soa_additions.ba_glass_dagger_of: A sacrificial dagger of glass. Mobs slain near an altar yield their life force.
death.attack.soa_additions.tconevo.chaos: %1$s was annihilated by %2$s using dark energy
%1$s was annihilated by %2$s using the dark energy of %3$s
This weapon drains life energy from enemies to heal its wielder.
This weapon deals bonus damage based on the target's missing health.
modifier.soa_additions.tconevo.culling.d: This weapon deals increased damage to enemies with less health than its wielder.
modifier.soa_additions.tconevo.juggernau: This weapon deals increased damage based on its wielder's current health.
modifier.soa_additions.tconevo.overwhelm: This weapon deals greater damage to armoured targets.
modifier.soa_additions.tconevo.opportuni: This weapon deals increased damage to debuffed targets.
modifier.soa_additions.tconevo.impact_fo: This weapon deals greater damage at high velocity.
modifier.soa_additions.tconevo.crystalli: You could buy a very small piano!
This weapon deals greater damage at higher durability.
modifier.soa_additions.tconevo.corruptin: This weapon inflicts increasing wither on fully-charged hits.
modifier.soa_additions.tconevo.battle_fu: This weapon grants its wielder increasing attack damage on fully-charged hits.
modifier.soa_additions.tconevo.luminifer: This weapon reveals the positions of struck enemies.
modifier.soa_additions.tconevo.foot_flee: Stay still--I'm trying to shoot you!
This weapon grants a burst of speed to its wielder on fully-charged hits.
modifier.soa_additions.tconevo.mortal_wo: This weapon reduces the enemy's healing for a duration.
modifier.soa_additions.tconevo.rejuvenat: This weapon applies regeneration to attacked targets.
modifier.soa_additions.tconevo.true_stri: This weapon pierces through evasion on fully-charged hits.
modifier.soa_additions.tconevo.ruination: This weapon deals damage scaling with enemy health on fully-charged hits.
modifier.soa_additions.tconevo.deadly_pr: This weapon deals greatly increased damage on critical strikes.
modifier.soa_additions.tconevo.relentles: This weapon induces a shorter invulnerability period in struck enemies.
modifier.soa_additions.tconevo.thundergo: This weapon calls down a bolt of lightning upon enemies struck at full health.
modifier.soa_additions.tconevo.purging.d: This weapon has a chance to remove positive buffs on fully-charged hits.
modifier.soa_additions.tconevo.staggerin: This weapon briefly immobilizes enemies on fully-charged hits.
modifier.soa_additions.tconevo.chain_lig: This weapon's fully-charged attacks have a chance of arcing to nearby enemies.
modifier.soa_additions.tconevo.aftershoc: This weapon deals additional magical damage on fully-charged hits.
modifier.soa_additions.tconevo.photosynt: This tool absorbs sunlight to repair itself.
modifier.soa_additions.tconevo.fertilizi: This tool can be used to fertilize crops at a large durability cost.
modifier.soa_additions.tconevo.cascading: This tool destroys falling blocks in columns.
modifier.soa_additions.tconevo.modifiabl: This equipment has additional free modifier slots.
modifier.soa_additions.tconevo.energized: This tool consumes an internal energy buffer before durability.
modifier.soa_additions.tconevo.piezoelec: This weapon converts damage from fully-charged hits into usable energy.
modifier.soa_additions.tconevo.photovolt: This tool absorbs sunlight to recharge itself.
modifier.soa_additions.tconevo.fluxed.de: This tool consumes energy before durability.
This weapon has a chance to pierce through evasion.
modifier.soa_additions.tconevo.bloodboun: This tool siphons its user's life essence to prevent damage to itself.
modifier.soa_additions.tconevo.crystalys: I'm not afraid of the darkness!
This weapon shatters soul networks to manifest weak blood shards.
This tool consumes demon will to increase its power.
modifier.soa_additions.tconevo.willful.d: This weapon severs the strands of demonic will that bind its enemies.
modifier.soa_additions.tconevo.aura_siph: This weapon converts some damage dealt to bonus mana.
modifier.soa_additions.tconevo.fae_voice: This weapon may summon pixies to attack foes.
modifier.soa_additions.tconevo.gaia_wrat: This weapon fires damaging beams when swung.
modifier.soa_additions.tconevo.mana_infu: This tool repairs itself using mana.
modifier.soa_additions.tconevo.omnipoten: This tool defies the will of gods.
modifier.soa_additions.tconevo.condensin: Try not to think about it.
Slain foes and broken blocks may leave behind a smattering of neutrons.
modifier.soa_additions.tconevo.eternal_d: This weapon condenses the energy from its strikes into EMC.
modifier.soa_additions.tconevo.evolved.f: Balanced, as all things should be.
modifier.soa_additions.tconevo.evolved.d: This tool uses energy and can be upgraded by fusion crafting.
modifier.soa_additions.tconevo.draconic_: This tool has increased energy capacity.
This tool has increased mining speed.
This weapon deals increased melee damage.
This weapon can be drawn faster.
This weapon fires shots at higher velocity.
modifier.soa_additions.tconevo.soul_rend: This weapon has innate soul-stealing abilities.
modifier.soa_additions.tconevo.reaping.d: This weapon has an additional chance to drop mob souls.
This weapon inflicts increased entropy on energy shields.
modifier.soa_additions.tconevo.primordia: The magic! It calls to me!
This weapon converts a portion of its damage to chaos damage.
modifier.soa_additions.tconevo.flux_burn: This weapon drains energy from armour and deals a portion of it as additional damage.
